title: Affiliate Center
description: Per-user affiliate program surface. Separate from Admin (admin is org-wide controls; affiliate is the per-user referral program any signed-in user can enroll in). Payments agent owns payout tracking, link attribution, fraud flags. Operations agent owns enrollment and workspace-side leaderboard. Conductor routes affiliate events to both.

code.description: Unique referral code used in the link.

commission_pct.description: Percentage commission on referred revenue. Default 20.

fraud_flag.description: Set when click-fraud or duplicate-account heuristics fire. Payments agent stops payout when flagged.

events_emitted.description: User generates a referral link with UTM params.
Referral link click logged with source/campaign/content.
Click → signup attribution. Links to a new user.
Referred account becomes a paying customer.
Payments agent schedules a payout to the affiliate.
Heuristic fires (e.g., self-referral, duplicate IP, abnormal velocity). Payouts stop. Admin notified via approval lane.

events_consumed.description: If new user has a referral cookie, attribute the signup.
If subscribing user came through an affiliate link, record the payment.
Reverses earned commission if within clawback window.
